Uses of Record Class
org.egothor.stemmer.TrieMetadata

Packages that use TrieMetadata
Package
Description
org.egothor.stemmer
Provides the core Egothor-style stemming infrastructure based on compact patch-command tries.

  • Uses of TrieMetadata in org.egothor.stemmer

    Methods in org.egothor.stemmer that return TrieMetadata
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static TrieMetadata
    TrieMetadata.current(int formatVersion, WordTraversalDirection traversalDirection, ReductionSettings reductionSettings)
    Creates metadata populated with current-format defaults for freshly compiled tries.
    static TrieMetadata
    TrieMetadata.forCompilation(WordTraversalDirection traversalDirection, ReductionSettings reductionSettings, DiacriticProcessingMode diacriticProcessingMode, CaseProcessingMode caseProcessingMode)
    Creates metadata for a newly compiled trie using the currently persisted binary stream format version.
    static TrieMetadata
    TrieMetadata.fromTextBlock(int formatVersion, String textBlock)
    Parses metadata from a text block produced by toTextBlock().
    static TrieMetadata
    TrieMetadata.legacy(int formatVersion, WordTraversalDirection traversalDirection)
    Creates metadata compatible with a legacy artifact version that did not store the full configuration explicitly.
    static TrieMetadata
    StemmerPatchTrieLoader.loadBinaryMetadata(InputStream inputStream)
    Loads only persisted metadata from a GZip-compressed binary patch-command trie stream.
    static TrieMetadata
    StemmerPatchTrieLoader.loadBinaryMetadata(String fileName)
    Loads only persisted metadata from a GZip-compressed binary patch-command trie file.
    static TrieMetadata
    StemmerPatchTrieLoader.loadBinaryMetadata(Path path)
    Loads only persisted metadata from a GZip-compressed binary patch-command trie file.
    TrieMetadata
    FrequencyTrie.metadata()
    Returns immutable persisted metadata associated with this trie.
    static TrieMetadata
    StemmerPatchTrieBinaryIO.readMetadata(InputStream inputStream)
    Reads only metadata from a GZip-compressed binary patch-command trie from an input stream.
    static TrieMetadata
    StemmerPatchTrieBinaryIO.readMetadata(String fileName)
    Reads only metadata from a GZip-compressed binary patch-command trie stored at a filesystem path string.
    static TrieMetadata
    StemmerPatchTrieBinaryIO.readMetadata(Path path)
    Reads only metadata from a GZip-compressed binary patch-command trie stored at a filesystem path.

    Method
    Description

    StemmerPatchTrieLoader.load(String fileName, boolean storeOriginal, TrieMetadata metadata)
    Loads a dictionary from a filesystem path string using explicit trie compilation metadata.

    Loads a dictionary from a filesystem path using explicit trie compilation metadata.

    Loads a bundled dictionary using explicit trie compilation metadata.
